app.use(bodyParser.json());
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
').filter(Boolean);

    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

import fetch from "node-fetch";

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "
"
    );
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },

      });

        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();

        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";

    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

import express from "express";
import bodyParser from "body-parser";
import fs from "fs";
import path from "path";
import { exec } from "child_process";

const app = express();

// --- 1️⃣ Status Map ---
const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };

// --- 2️⃣ Body Parser ---
app.use(bodyParser.json());

// --- 3️⃣ Delegate Endpoint ---
app.post("/tasks/delegate", (req, res) => {
  try {
    console.log("📥 Delegate POST received:", req.body);
    res.json({ status: "ok", taskId: req.body.taskId });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Error in /tasks/delegate:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ status: "error" });
  }
});

// --- 4️⃣ Chat Endpoint for Matilda ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
    const reply = "(response placeholder)";

    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "\n"
    );

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Error in /api/chat:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

// --- 5️⃣ Agent Status Endpoint ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) return res.json(statusMap);

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const map = { ...statusMap };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) map.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) map.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) map.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(map);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("❌ Error in /api/agent-status:", err);
      res.json(statusMap);
    }
  });
});

// --- 6️⃣ Start Server ---
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

/* eslint-disable import/no-commonjs */
import express from "express";
import path from "path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
import { exec } from "child_process";
import fs from "fs";
import fetch from "node-fetch";  // for calling local Ollama API

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

const app = express();
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const logs = fs.readFileSync(logFile, "utf-8").split("
").filter(Boolean);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

// --- 4️⃣ Chat Endpoint for Matilda ---
import fetch from "node-fetch";
import bodyParser from "body-parser";

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "
"
    );
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();

        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

const logs = fs.readFileSync(logFile, "utf-8").split("\n").filter(Boolean);
import bodyParser from "body-parser";
/* eslint-disable import/no-commonjs */
import express from "express";
import path from "path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
import { exec } from "child_process";
import fs from "fs";
import fetch from "node-fetch";  // for calling local Ollama API

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

const app = express();
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);

    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

// --- 4️⃣ Chat Endpoint for Matilda ---
import fetch from "node-fetch";

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "
"
    );
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

import express from "express";
import path from "path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
import { exec } from "child_process";
import fs from "fs";
import fetch from "node-fetch";  // for calling local Ollama API

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

const app = express();
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

// --- 4️⃣ Chat Endpoint for Matilda ---

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

/* eslint-disable import/no-commonjs */
import express from "express";
import path from "path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
import { exec } from "child_process";
import fs from "fs";
import fetch from "node-fetch";  // for calling local Ollama API

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

const app = express();
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);

      return { message: line };
    }
  });

});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

import fetch from "node-fetch";
import bodyParser from "body-parser";

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "
"
    );
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

import express from "express";
import path from "path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
import { exec } from "child_process";
import fs from "fs";
import fetch from "node-fetch";  // for calling local Ollama API

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

const app = express();
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const logs = fs.readFileSync(logFile, "utf-8").split("
").filter(Boolean);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

73:app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {

import express from "express";
import bodyParser from "body-parser";
import fs from "fs";
import path from "path";
import { exec } from "child_process";

const app = express();

// --- 1️⃣ Status Map ---
const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };

// --- 2️⃣ Body Parser ---
app.use(bodyParser.json());

// --- 3️⃣ Delegate Endpoint ---
// --- 5️⃣ Agent Status Endpoint ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) return res.json(statusMap);

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const map = { ...statusMap };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) map.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) map.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) map.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(map);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("❌ Error in /api/agent-status:", err);
      res.json(statusMap);
    }
  });
});

// --- 6️⃣ Start Server ---
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

// --- Delegate Endpoint ---
app.post("/tasks/delegate", (req, res) => {
  console.log("📥 Delegate POST received:", req.body);
  res.json({ status: "ok", taskId: req.body.taskId });
});

// --- Chat Endpoint ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
    const reply = "(response placeholder)";

    // Dashboard ticker log
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "\n"
    );

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Error in /api/chat:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

// --- Agent Status Endpoint ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) return res.json(statusMap);

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const map = { ...statusMap };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) map.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) map.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) map.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(map);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("❌ Error in /api/agent-status:", err);
      res.json(statusMap);
    }
  });
});

// --- Start Server ---
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

// --- 4️⃣ Chat Endpoint for Matilda ---
import fetch from "node-fetch";

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "
"
    );
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});
app.post("/tasks/delegate", (req, res) => {
  console.log("📥 Delegate POST received:", req.body);
  res.json({ status: "ok", taskId: req.body.taskId });
});

import bodyParser from "body-parser";
/* eslint-disable import/no-commonjs */
import express from "express";
import path from "path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
import { exec } from "child_process";
import fs from "fs";
import fetch from "node-fetch";  // for calling local Ollama API

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

const app = express();
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
const logs = fs.readFileSync(logFile, 'utf-8').split('
').filter(Boolean);
').filter(Boolean);
').filter(Boolean);
').filter(Boolean);
').filter(Boolean);
').filter(Boolean);
').filter(Boolean);
').filter(Boolean);
").filter(Boolean);
").filter(Boolean);
").filter(Boolean);
").filter(Boolean);
").filter(Boolean);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

// --- 4️⃣ Chat Endpoint for Matilda ---

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

import bodyParser from "body-parser";

import express from "express";
const app = express();
app.use(express.json());// New Endpoint for P1 completion: Allows external services (agents) to post lifecycle updates.
// Functionality: Writes status updates (started, completed, failed) to task-events.log.
app.post('/tasks/update-status', (req, res) => {
    // Expecting task_id, status, and agent
    const { task_id, status, agent, description } = req.body; 

    if (!task_id || !status || !agent) {
        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Missing required fields: task_id, status, or agent.' });
    }
    
    const validStatuses = ['started', 'completed', 'failed'];
    if (!validStatuses.includes(status)) {
        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid status provided. Must be one of: started, completed, or failed.' });
    }

    const taskEvent = {
        task_id: task_id,
        status: status,
        agent: agent,
        description: description || 'Status update logged.',
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };

    const logLine = JSON.stringify(taskEvent) + '\n';
    
    fs.appendFile(TASK_LOG_FILE, logLine, (err) => {
        if (err) {
            console.error('Error writing task status update:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: 'Failed to log task status update.' });
        }
        
        console.log(`[TASK-LOG] Task ${task_id} updated to status: ${status}.`);
        res.status(200).json({ 
            success: true, 
            message: `Task ${task_id} status updated to ${status}.`,
            event: taskEvent
        });
    });
});


// P1 Implementation: Live stream of task lifecycle events
// Endpoint: /api/task-stream (SSE)
// Watches: ./task-events.log (Our new log file)
app.get('/api/task-stream', (req, res) => {
    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
    res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache');
    res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
    res.flushHeaders();

    console.log('Client connected to /api/task-stream');

    // Function to read the last line of the log and send as an SSE event
    const sendTaskEvent = () => {
        // Read the file to get the latest entry (simulating a 'tail -f' behavior)
        fs.readFile(TASK_LOG_FILE, 'utf8', (err, data) => {
            if (err) {
                // Ignore file not found error (it's created on first delegation)
                if (err.code === 'ENOENT') return;
                console.error('Error reading task-events.log:', err);
                return;
            }

            const lines = data.trim().split('\n');
            if (lines.length > 0) {
                const lastLine = lines[lines.length - 1];
                
                // Format the JSON line as an SSE 'taskUpdate' event
                res.write(`event: taskUpdate\n`);
                res.write(`data: ${lastLine}\n\n`);
            }
        });
    };

    // Use fs.watchFile for simple cross-platform file change detection on the log file
    fs.watchFile(TASK_LOG_FILE, { interval: 500 }, (curr, prev) => {
        // Only send updates if the file size has changed (new data written)
        if (curr.mtime !== prev.mtime) {
            sendTaskEvent();
        }
    });

    // Cleanup when client disconnects
    req.on('close', () => {
        console.log('Client disconnected from /api/task-stream');
        fs.unwatchFile(TASK_LOG_FILE);
    });
});
// Endpoint from Overview: /tasks/delegate POST

    if (!task_id || !status || !agent) {
        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Missing required fields: task_id, status, or agent.' });
    }
    
    const validStatuses = ['started', 'completed', 'failed'];
    if (!validStatuses.includes(status)) {
        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid status provided. Must be one of: started, completed, or failed.' });
    }

    const taskEvent = {
        task_id: task_id,
        status: status,
        agent: agent,
        description: description || 'Status update logged.',
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };

    const logLine = JSON.stringify(taskEvent) + '\n';
    
    fs.appendFile(TASK_LOG_FILE, logLine, (err) => {
        if (err) {
            console.error('Error writing task status update:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: 'Failed to log task status update.' });
        }
        
        console.log(`[TASK-LOG] Task ${task_id} updated to status: ${status}.`);
        res.status(200).json({ 
            success: true, 
            message: `Task ${task_id} status updated to ${status}.`,
            event: taskEvent
        });
    });
});

const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

import bodyParser from "body-parser";
/* eslint-disable import/no-commonjs */
import express from "express";
import path from "path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
import { exec } from "child_process";
import fs from "fs";
import fetch from "node-fetch";  // for calling local Ollama API

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

const app = express();
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

// --- 4️⃣ Chat Endpoint for Matilda ---

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

import fetch from "node-fetch";

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "
"

54:app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {

import express from "express";
import bodyParser from "body-parser";
import fs from "fs";
import path from "path";
import { exec } from "child_process";

const app = express();

// --- 1️⃣ Status Map ---
const statusMap = {
  Matilda: { status: "offline" },
  Cade: { status: "offline" },
  Effie: { status: "offline" }
};

// --- 2️⃣ Body Parser ---
app.use(bodyParser.json());

// --- 3️⃣ Delegate Endpoint ---
app.post("/tasks/delegate", (req, res) => {
  try {
    console.log("📥 Delegate POST received:", req.body);
    res.json({ status: "ok", taskId: req.body.taskId });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Error in /tasks/delegate:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ status: "error" });
  }
});

// --- 4️⃣ Chat Endpoint for Matilda ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
    const reply = "(response placeholder)";

    // Log to dashboard ticker
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "\n"
    );

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Error in /api/chat:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

// --- 5️⃣ Agent Status Endpoint ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json(statusMap);
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const map = { ...statusMap };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) map.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) map.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) map.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(map);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("❌ Error in /api/agent-status:", err);
      res.json(statusMap);
    }
  });
});

// --- 6️⃣ Start Server ---
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";
} catch (err) { console.error("❌ Error:", err); }
    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

import bodyParser from "body-parser";
/* eslint-disable import/no-commonjs */
import express from "express";
import path from "path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
import { exec } from "child_process";
import fs from "fs";
import fetch from "node-fetch";  // for calling local Ollama API

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

const app = express();
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
app.use(bodyParser.json());
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
const logs = fs.readFileSync(logFile, "utf-8").split("
").filter(Boolean);
").filter(Boolean);
").filter(Boolean);
").filter(Boolean);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

// --- 4️⃣ Chat Endpoint for Matilda ---
import fetch from "node-fetch";

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "
"
    );
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

/* eslint-disable import/no-commonjs */
import express from "express";
import path from "path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
import { exec } from "child_process";
import fs from "fs";
import fetch from "node-fetch";  // for calling local Ollama API

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

const app = express();
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const logs = fs.readFileSync(logFile, "utf-8").split("
").filter(Boolean);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),

        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "
"
    );
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

/* eslint-disable import/no-commonjs */
import express from "express";
import path from "path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
import { exec } from "child_process";
import fs from "fs";
import fetch from "node-fetch";  // for calling local Ollama API

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

const app = express();
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const logs = fs.readFileSync(logFile, "utf-8").split("
").filter(Boolean);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

// --- 4️⃣ Chat Endpoint for Matilda ---

      }) + "

    );
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});

import bodyParser from "body-parser";

import express from "express";
const app = express();
app.use(express.json());// New Endpoint for P1 completion: Allows external services (agents) to post lifecycle updates.
// Functionality: Writes status updates (started, completed, failed) to task-events.log.
app.post('/tasks/update-status', (req, res) => {
    // Expecting task_id, status, and agent
    const { task_id, status, agent, description } = req.body; 

    if (!task_id || !status || !agent) {
        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Missing required fields: task_id, status, or agent.' });
    }
    
    const validStatuses = ['started', 'completed', 'failed'];
    if (!validStatuses.includes(status)) {
        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid status provided. Must be one of: started, completed, or failed.' });
    }

    const taskEvent = {
        task_id: task_id,
        status: status,
        agent: agent,
        description: description || 'Status update logged.',
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };

    const logLine = JSON.stringify(taskEvent) + '\n';
    
    fs.appendFile(TASK_LOG_FILE, logLine, (err) => {
        if (err) {
            console.error('Error writing task status update:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: 'Failed to log task status update.' });
        }
        
        console.log(`[TASK-LOG] Task ${task_id} updated to status: ${status}.`);
        res.status(200).json({ 
            success: true, 
            message: `Task ${task_id} status updated to ${status}.`,
            event: taskEvent
        });
    });
});


// P1 Implementation: Live stream of task lifecycle events
// Endpoint: /api/task-stream (SSE)
// Watches: ./task-events.log (Our new log file)
app.get('/api/task-stream', (req, res) => {
    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
    res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache');
    res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
    res.flushHeaders();

    console.log('Client connected to /api/task-stream');

    // Function to read the last line of the log and send as an SSE event
    const sendTaskEvent = () => {
        // Read the file to get the latest entry (simulating a 'tail -f' behavior)
        fs.readFile(TASK_LOG_FILE, 'utf8', (err, data) => {
            if (err) {
                // Ignore file not found error (it's created on first delegation)
                if (err.code === 'ENOENT') return;
                console.error('Error reading task-events.log:', err);
                return;
            }

            const lines = data.trim().split('\n');
            if (lines.length > 0) {
                const lastLine = lines[lines.length - 1];
                
                // Format the JSON line as an SSE 'taskUpdate' event
                res.write(`event: taskUpdate\n`);
                res.write(`data: ${lastLine}\n\n`);
            }
        });
    };

    // Use fs.watchFile for simple cross-platform file change detection on the log file
    fs.watchFile(TASK_LOG_FILE, { interval: 500 }, (curr, prev) => {
        // Only send updates if the file size has changed (new data written)
        if (curr.mtime !== prev.mtime) {
            sendTaskEvent();
        }
    });

    // Cleanup when client disconnects
    req.on('close', () => {
        console.log('Client disconnected from /api/task-stream');
        fs.unwatchFile(TASK_LOG_FILE);
    });
});

    }

    if (!validStatuses.includes(status)) {
        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid status provided. Must be one of: started, completed, or failed.' });
    }

    const taskEvent = {
        task_id: task_id,
        status: status,
        agent: agent,
        description: description || 'Status update logged.',
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };

    const logLine = JSON.stringify(taskEvent) + '\n';
    
    fs.appendFile(TASK_LOG_FILE, logLine, (err) => {
        if (err) {
            console.error('Error writing task status update:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ success: false, message: 'Failed to log task status update.' });
        }
        
        console.log(`[TASK-LOG] Task ${task_id} updated to status: ${status}.`);
        res.status(200).json({ 
            success: true, 
            message: `Task ${task_id} status updated to ${status}.`,
            event: taskEvent
        });
    });
});

app.use(bodyParser.json());
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
const logs = fs.readFileSync(logFile, "utf-8").split("\n").filter(Boolean);
").filter(Boolean);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

app.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`✅ Dashboard live on port ${PORT}`));

// --- 4️⃣ Chat Endpoint for Matilda ---
import fetch from "node-fetch";
import bodyParser from "body-parser";

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "
"
    );
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});
app.post("/tasks/delegate", (req, res) => {
  console.log("📥 Delegate POST received:", req.body);
  res.json({ status: "ok", taskId: req.body.taskId });
});

import express from "express";
import path from "path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "url";
import { exec } from "child_process";
import fs from "fs";
import fetch from "node-fetch";  // for calling local Ollama API

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);

const app = express();
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard")));
app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, "public")));

// --- 1️⃣ Agent Status via PM2 ---
app.get("/api/agent-status", (req, res) => {
  exec("pm2 jlist", (err, stdout) => {
    if (err) {
      return res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const list = JSON.parse(stdout);
      const statusMap = { Matilda: { status: "offline" }, Cade: { status: "offline" }, Effie: { status: "offline" } };
      list.forEach(proc => {
        const name = proc.name.toLowerCase();
        const online = proc.pm2_env.status === "online";
        if (name.includes("matilda")) statusMap.Matilda.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("cade")) statusMap.Cade.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
        if (name.includes("effie")) statusMap.Effie.status = online ? "online" : "offline";
      });
      res.json(statusMap);
    } catch {
      res.json({
        Matilda: { status: "offline" },
        Cade: { status: "offline" },
        Effie: { status: "offline" }
      });
    }
  });
});

// --- 2️⃣ Chat Endpoint: Send input to Ollama ---
app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body.message || "";
  if (!userMessage.trim()) return res.json({ reply: "..." });

  try {
    const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ model: "llama3:8b", prompt: userMessage, stream: false })
    });

    const data = await response.json();
    const reply = data.response || "(no response)";

    res.json({ reply });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat error:", err);
    res.json({ reply: "(Matilda is thinking... or disconnected)" });
  }
});

// --- 3️⃣ Ops Stream & Project Tracker Endpoints (Unchanged) ---
app.get("/api/ops-stream", (req, res) => {
  const logFile = path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log");
  if (!fs.existsSync(logFile)) return res.json([]);
  const logs = fs.readFileSync(logFile, "utf-8").split("
").filter(Boolean);
  const events = logs.slice(-20).map(line => {
    try {
      const obj = JSON.parse(line);
      return { message: `${obj.agent} | ${obj.event}` };
    } catch {
      return { message: line };
    }
  });
  res.json(events);
});

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(bodyParser.json());

app.post("/api/chat", async (req, res) => {
  const userMessage = req.body?.message || "";
  console.log("📩 Chat received:", userMessage);

  try {
    // Call local Ollama server
    const ollamaRes = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: "llama3:8b",
        prompt: userMessage,
        stream: false
      })
    });

    const ollamaData = await ollamaRes.json();
    const reply = ollamaData.response || "(no response)";
    console.log("🤖 Matilda reply:", reply);

    // Return reply to dashboard
    res.json({ reply });

    // Optional: Log chat to ticker-events.log for auditing
    fs.appendFileSync(
      path.join(__dirname, "ui/dashboard/ticker-events.log"),
      JSON.stringify({
        timestamp: Math.floor(Date.now()/1000),
        agent: "matilda",
        event: `chat: ${userMessage} -> ${reply}`
      }) + "
"
    );
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("❌ Chat error:", err);
    res.status(500).json({ reply: "(error)" });
  }
});
